zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Threlkeld於1258年出生在英國英格蘭波藍德雷爾可爾德時，他的父親William Threlkeld39歲，母親Isabel de Hastings48歲。他於1280年之前與Roberta Newbiggin在英國英格蘭波藍德雷爾可爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1290年享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Threlkeld于1258年出生在英国英格兰波藍德雷爾可爾德时，他的父亲William Threlkeld39岁，母亲Isabel de Hastings48岁。他于1280年之前与Roberta Newbiggin在英国英格兰波藍德雷爾可爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1290年享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: Threlkeld
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cumbria): habitational name from Threlkeld in Cumbria, so named from Old Norse thrǽll ‘thrall, serf’ + kelda ‘spring, marshy place’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Threlkeld was born in 1258, in Threlkeld, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Threlkeld, was 39 and his mother, Isabel de Hastings, was 48. He married Roberta Newbiggin before 1280, in Threlkeld, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1290, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Threlkeld est né en 1258, à Threlkeld, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Threlkeld, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Hastings, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Roberta Newbiggin avant 1280, à Threlkeld, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1290, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Threlkeld 1258 in Threlkeld, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Threlkeld 39 und seine Mutter Isabel de Hastings 48. Er hat vor 1280 in Threlkeld, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom Roberta Newbiggin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1290 im Alter von 32 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Threlkeld è nato il nel 1258 nel Threlkeld, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Threlkeld, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Hastings, aveva 48 anni. Lui sposato Roberta Newbiggin prima del 1280, nel Threlkeld, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1290, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Threlkeldが1258年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドスレルケルドで生まれた時，父William Threlkeldは39歳，母Isabel de Hastingsは48歳であった。1280年以前にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドスレルケルドでRoberta Newbigginと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1290年に32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Threlkeld(이)가 1258년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 스렐켈드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Threlkeld(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Hastings(은)는 48세였다. 그는 1280년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 스렐켈드에서 Roberta Newbiggin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1290년 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Threlkeld nasceu em 1258, em Threlkeld, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Threlkeld, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Hastings, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Roberta Newbiggin antes 1280, em Threlkeld, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1290, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Threlkeld родился в 1258 г. в местности трелкелд, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Threlkeld было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Hastings, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Roberta Newbiggin перед 1280 г. в местности трелкелд, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1290 г. в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Threlkeld nació en 1258, en Threlkeld, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Threlkeld, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Isabel de Hastings, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Roberta Newbiggin antes de 1280, en Threlkeld, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1290, a la edad de 32 años.
